name: Lukasz Kaiser
key_contributions: Co-authored "Attention Is All You Need" (2017) — introduced the Transformer architecture
Key contributor to sequence-to-sequence learning research at Google Brain
Co-created the Tensor2Tensor library for deep learning research
Later joined OpenAI to work on reasoning and code generation
summary: Lukasz Kaiser is a co-author of 'Attention Is All You Need' (2017), the paper that introduced the Transformer architecture. At Google Brain, he made significant contributions to sequence-to-sequence learning and co-created the Tensor2Tensor library, which became widely used for deep learning research. He later joined OpenAI, where he worked on reasoning and code generation capabilities.
